infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to show nearby charging stations and help you navigate when you're on the move.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Optional future use for reminders when you're near your booked station.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow EV Charge Booking to use your location while using the app to find nearby chargers.
